sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_table (id INT PRIMARY KEY, data VARCHAR(255), created_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP);
INSERT INTO test_table (id, data) VALUES (1, 'Sample Data'), (2, 'Another Sample'), (3, NULL), (4, ' ');
SELECT id, data, table_set_policy('test_policy') AS policy FROM test_table WHERE datatype(data) = 'http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#string' OR data IS NULL;
SELECT DISTINCT id, COUNT(*) OVER (PARTITION BY datatype(data)) AS datatype_count FROM test_table WHERE table_set_policy('another_policy') IS NOT NULL;
SELECT id, SUM(CASE WHEN data IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS not_null_count FROM test_table GROUP BY id HAVING not_null_count > 0;
SELECT id, MAX(datatype(data)) AS max_dtype FROM test_table GROUP BY id ORDER BY max_dtype DESC;
WITH filtered_data AS (SELECT id, data FROM test_table WHERE table_set_policy('test_policy') IS NOT NULL) SELECT id, datatype(data) FROM filtered_data WHERE data <> '';
CREATE TABLE join_table (join_id INT, join_data VARCHAR(255), FOREIGN KEY (join_id) REFERENCES test_table(id));
INSERT INTO join_table (join_id, join_data) VALUES (1, 'Join Data 1'), (2, 'Join Data 2');
SELECT tt.id, tt.data, jt.join_data FROM test_table tt JOIN join_table jt ON tt.id = jt.join_id WHERE table_set_policy('join_policy') IS NOT NULL;
SELECT tt.id, COUNT(jt.join_data) AS join_count FROM test_table tt LEFT JOIN join_table jt ON tt.id = jt.join_id GROUP BY tt.id HAVING join_count > 0;
